name: Chicken with Spicy Fruit Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pineapple juice, raisins, crushed red pepper, and garlic in a large non-aluminum skillet.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Add chicken breasts; cover and reduce heat. Simmer until the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
4. Remove from skillet and keep warm.
5. Return cooking liquid to a boil. Cook for an additional 7 minutes or until reduced by one-fourth.
6. Stir in strawberry spread and cornstarch until smooth.
7. Cook for 1 minute more until syrupy.
8. Serve sauce over chicken, garnished with green onion strips.
215 Cal. Per Chicken Breast Half & 3 T. Sauce. (Fat 1.5, Chol. 66.)
